name: PROCACCIANTI HOTEL REIT, INC.
business: Procaccianti Hotel REIT, Inc. owns interests in select-service hotel properties and leases them to taxable REIT subsidiary lessees (TRS Lessees), which engage third-party management companies to operate the hotels. The company's properties consist of upper midscale, upscale, and upper upscale hotels serving business and leisure travelers. As of December 31, 2025, the company owned an interest in five hotel properties with a total of 559 rooms.

exposures.sentence: We are increasingly dependent on information technology, and potential cyber-attacks, security problems or other disruption and expanding social media vehicles present new risks.
We may face challenges managing rapidly advancing artificial intelligence in our business which could adversely affect our competitive position.

catalysts.event: Refinancing of Hilton Garden Inn Providence mortgage note
catalysts.sentence: we refinanced the mortgage note for the Hilton Garden Inn Providence on July 10, 2025;

catalysts.event: Payment of accrued A Share distributions
catalysts.sentence: On July 31, 2025, the Company paid $2,388,072 of accrued distributions to A Share stockholders, which represented distributions that had accrued from September 29, 2016 through June 30, 2024.
